stories.headline: Bowen: Why Ukraine remains defiant and does not feel close to defeat
stories.description: Ukraine marks four years since the invasion, with ceasefire hopes still distant.

stories.headline: Army helicopter crashes into Iran market, killing 2 pilots and 2 merchants
stories.description: The incident in Isfahan province follows crash of fighter jet in Hamadan province less than a week ago.

stories.headline: Trump's new global tariff comes into effect at 10%
stories.description: The president threatened to raise the tariff to 15% but has not yet issued an official directive to increase the rate.

stories.headline: With ‘El Mencho’ killed, what’s next for Mexico and the Jalisco cartel?
stories.description: Mexico kills Oseguera Cervantes, triggering violence and uncertainty over the CJNG’s future power structure.

stories.headline: Nearly 20 countries slam Israel’s ‘de facto annexation’ drive in West Bank
stories.description: Joint statement says Israeli land grab is ‘deliberate and direct attack’ on the viability of a Palestinian state.
